title: Generate embeddings with Jina model
story: As a framework developer, I want the embedding pipeline to use the Jina v2 Base Code model so that I can generate working embeddings for semantic search.
acceptance_criteria: Jina adapter initializes and returns valid embeddings
Adapter returns null when transformers package is missing

title: Install without native build steps
story: As a framework user on macOS ARM, I want npm install to complete without native compilation so that I can get started without installing Python or Rust toolchains.
acceptance_criteria: npm install requires no native build steps on macOS ARM
onnxruntime-node is removed from direct dependencies
@huggingface/transformers is present as a regular dependency

title: Pre-warm model during discover
story: As a framework user running /discover for the first time, I want the Jina model to be downloaded during setup so that my first embedding generation is fast.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-warm failure does not block discover (fail-open)

title: Warning for stale embeddings
story: As a framework user with existing .emb files, I want to see a clear warning when my embeddings were generated with a different model so that I know to regenerate.
acceptance_criteria: Warning shown when .emb files lack model_id or have wrong model_id
No warning for freshly generated .emb files with correct model_id
